bugs_to_fix.description: onGridDown has the 'Quick-select tool' block duplicated 6 times (~lines 2944-3040). Only 1 copy should exist.
bugs_to_fix.fix: Remove the 5 duplicate blocks, keeping only the first occurrence.

tasks.title: Fix duplicated quick-select blocks in onGridDown
tasks.description: Remove the 5 duplicate copies of the quick-select tool check in onGridDown. Only the first block should remain.
tasks.acceptance: onGridDown contains exactly 1 occurrence of the quick-select tool block.

tasks.title: Mobile detection and CSS custom properties
tasks.description: Add CSS media query for screens < 768px in portrait. Set --mobile: 1 custom property. Add mobile-specific layout variables.
tasks.acceptance: On viewport < 768px wide, mobile layout activates via CSS media queries.

tasks.title: Bottom drawer palette for mobile
tasks.description: On mobile, the sidebar becomes a horizontal scroll strip docked to the bottom. Collapsible via a toggle handle. Uses CSS flex with overflow-x: auto. Palette pieces scroll horizontally with section labels.
tasks.acceptance: On mobile, palette appears as bottom drawer with horizontal scroll. Sidebar is hidden. Toggle handle shows/hides drawer.

tasks.title: Larger touch targets on mobile
tasks.description: Palette pieces: 72px on mobile (up from 54px). Control buttons: min 48px height. Sidebar toggle adapted for mobile.
tasks.acceptance: Palette pieces are 72px on mobile. Control buttons are at least 48px tall.

tasks.title: Grid fills available space above drawer
tasks.description: On mobile, grid fills the viewport above the bottom drawer and below the controls. calculateSize() updated to account for bottom drawer height.
tasks.acceptance: Grid uses full available height on mobile. No horizontal scroll. Game fills screen on iPhone SE (375px).

tasks.title: Prevent accidental page zoom/scroll
tasks.description: Already have touch-action: none on body. Ensure grid and drawer also have proper touch-action settings. Prevent double-tap zoom on buttons.
tasks.acceptance: No accidental zoom or scroll during gameplay on mobile.

tasks.title: Haptic feedback on mobile
tasks.description: Add navigator.vibrate(10) on track placement, vibrate([5,5,5]) on removal. Only trigger when vibrate API is available.
tasks.acceptance: Haptic feedback fires on place and remove on supported devices. No errors on unsupported devices.

tasks.title: Mobile-optimized controls layout
tasks.description: Controls bar wraps nicely on mobile. Essential buttons (Play, Random, Clear, Puzzles) are prominent. Secondary buttons (Undo, Redo, Night, Save, Shortcuts) are smaller or in a collapsed row.
tasks.acceptance: Controls fit on mobile without horizontal scroll. Key buttons are easily tappable.

testing_focus: Mobile layout renders correctly at 375px width (iPhone SE)
Bottom drawer scrolls horizontally through all palette items
Track placement works via drag from bottom drawer
Grid fills available space, no overflow
All existing features still work on desktop
Haptic feedback fires on supported devices
